name: commercial_recall_quality_v1
description: Golden recall cases for commercial scope-recall readiness: durable procedure retrieval, low-value exclusion, archived old-fact exclusion, stale/current fact freshness, candidate/progress non-dominance, topic isolation, and Experience playbook selection.

setup.label: atlas_deploy
setup.content: Project Atlas production deploy command is uv run atlas-server --env prod. Always run pytest before deploy.

setup.label: atlas_low_value_general
setup.content: Temporary Project Atlas dinner note: Joy likes warm soup tonight after deployment discussion.

setup.label: northstar_old_archived
setup.content: Northstar API base URL is https://old-api.invalid/v1. This fact was replaced by a newer live check.

setup.label: northstar_stale
setup.content: Northstar API base URL is https://stale-api.invalid/v1 according to an expired configuration snapshot.

setup.label: northstar_current
setup.content: Northstar API base URL is https://api.northstar.example/v2 according to the latest live configuration check.

setup.label: zephyr_ops
setup.content: Project Zephyr rollback runbook uses systemctl restart zephyr-worker after verifying queue drain metrics.

setup.label: orion_promoted_runbook
setup.content: Project Orion release runbook: run uv run pytest, then uv run orion deploy --stable, then verify /health returns ok.

setup.label: orion_candidate_idea
setup.content: Project Orion release candidate idea: maybe deploy with orion experimental fast path after more review.

setup.label: lyra_final_status
setup.content: Project Lyra migration final status is complete: data moved, checksums verified, and cleanup finished.

setup.label: lyra_progress_note
setup.content: Project Lyra migration progress note: partial copy is still running and checksum verification is pending.

playbooks.label: scope_recall_release_playbook_promoted
playbooks.title: Scope Recall release verification playbook
playbooks.trigger: release or verify Scope Recall package after code changes
playbooks.goal: Verify Scope Recall release readiness with source tests and live-safe checks before publishing.
playbooks.step: Run focused pytest, release gate, and inspect live-safe doctor output before publishing.

playbooks.label: scope_recall_release_playbook_candidate
playbooks.title: Scope Recall release verification draft
playbooks.trigger: release or verify Scope Recall package draft idea
playbooks.goal: Draft release verification flow that still needs independent review.
playbooks.step: Maybe skip focused tests and rely on release gate only after later review.

cases.name: archived old fact is excluded
cases.query: Northstar API base URL current latest configuration

cases.name: fresh current fact beats stale fact
cases.query: Northstar API base URL latest live configuration

cases.name: candidate memory cannot outrank promoted runbook
cases.query: Project Orion release runbook deploy stable health

cases.name: progress note cannot outrank final status
cases.query: Project Lyra migration final status checksums cleanup complete

cases.name: topic isolation avoids atlas on zephyr rollback
cases.query: Project Zephyr rollback worker queue drain

cases.name: experience preflight selects promoted playbook only
cases.query: Scope Recall release verification after code changes
